IndexPage.description: This is a basic example that demonstrates the usage of next-intl with the Next.js App Router. Try changing the locale in the top right corner and see how the content changes.

PathnamesPage.description:
The pathnames are internationalized too.

If you're using the default language English, you'll see /en/pathnames in the browser address bar on this page.

If you change the locale to German, the URL is localized accordingly (/de/pfadnamen).
PathnamesPage.title: Pathnames

hero.title: Diverse Brand Communication Solutions
hero.subtitle: We help brands connect with their audience through strategic communication

services.title:
Empowering
Brand Growth
services.subtitle: Our Services
services.description: Whether it’s breaking through for a new brand or revitalizing an established one, we tailor communication strategies from brand positioning to execution. Our end-to-end solutions ensure that every investment delivers tangible and measurable impact.

clients.title: Partnering with Exceptional Brands
clients.subtitle: Our Clients
clients.description: We are not just service providers—we are partners in your brand’s journey. From startups to established global brands, we are committed to delivering excellence in everything we do.

connecting.title: Crossing Cultures, Connecting Globally
connecting.description: B&D Media was founded in Toronto, Canada, and has since expanded to Beijing, China. With a dual-hub strategy spanning both North America and China, we blend diverse cultural perspectives to create global-minded communication strategies. Through strategic consulting, creative storytelling, and digital technology, we help brands break through geographical boundaries and engage with audiences worldwide.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.description: We work with clients across various sectors including technology, finance, healthcare, retail, and more

news.title: Global Perspective, Cutting-Edge Insights
news.subtitle: Latest News
news.description: We stay ahead of the curve by tracking global brand communication trends and sharing the latest case studies and industry insights. Our goal is to provide brands with forward-thinking strategies and practical guidance.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.subtitle: B&D Media International Strategy Local Deepening

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: Founded in 2023, we have been dedicated to providing innovative solutions. Our journey began with a simple idea: to make technology accessible to everyone, and has since evolved into a comprehensive platform for learning and growth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We strive to empower individuals and organizations through technology education. Our team is committed to delivering excellence in everything we do.

advantage.title: Our Advantage
advantage.advantage1_description: Based on the North American marketing methodology, combined with the characteristics of the Chinese market, providing customized communication strategies.
advantage.advantage2_description: Using advanced data analysis tools to understand consumer behavior and accurately target the target audience.
advantage.advantage3_description: Combining advanced technology with creative strategies to create truly impactful content.

WorksPage.title: B&D Media Case
WorksPage.subtitle: Storytelling, Data-driven Communication
WorksPage.description_01: We partner with leading brands from technology, finance, fast-moving consumer goods, luxury goods, and healthcare industries to help them break through cultural boundaries and create meaningful communication experiences. From strategic planning to creative execution, each case reflects our commitment to the "information-effective" concept.
WorksPage.description_02: Whether it's international brand localization or domestic brand globalization, we leverage our cross-industry experience, multicultural perspective, and data-driven approach to deliver measurable business value to our partners.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.contactIntro: Have questions or want to learn more? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

form.name: Name
form.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
form.errorMessage: An error occurred while submitting your message. Please try again.

Footer.title: Footer
Footer.description: Founded in 2004, B&D Media is a global creative agency based in Toronto and Beijing, specializing in strategy, storytelling, and integrated marketing.
